highlight: 2026 tax data for 14 countries, plus a new destination wizard that makes it much easier to add and edit countries in your comparison
improvements: A new destination wizard replaces the old inline form — a 3-step dialog guides you through country, tax options, and living costs, making it much easier to add or edit a destination
You can now toggle between a single shared gross salary for all destinations or individual salaries per country, with a confirmation step to avoid accidental changes
The edit (pencil) button in each country header opens the wizard so you can reconfigure any destination without removing and re-adding it
Country auto-detection now reads your timezone first (physical location) rather than your browser language, so an English-language browser in the Netherlands correctly defaults to the Netherlands
Salary amounts entered for one destination are automatically converted to the local currency when you add a new destination with a different currency
